symptoms.symptom_name: Uncontrollable crying dissociated from (incongruent with) actual mood

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Mood-incongruent involuntary crying is the defining feature of pseudobulbar affect.
In depression, crying is congruent with a sustained low mood, not dissociated from it.

symptoms.symptom_name: Completely preserved calm emotional baseline between episodes

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Brief, stereotyped episodes with a normal inter-ictal state are characteristic.
A pervasive, sustained low mood would be expected in depression, not a fully preserved baseline.

symptoms.symptom_name: Episodes triggered by trivial, unrelated stimuli

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Release of the emotional-motor reflex by minor non-specific triggers reflects loss of cortical inhibition.

symptoms.symptom_name: Patient denies feeling sad, low or hopeless

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Explicit absence of the core affective symptom argues strongly against a primary depressive disorder.
Emotional expression dissociated from experience is the hallmark of pseudobulbar affect.

symptoms.symptom_name: Known prior multiple strokes / bilateral cerebrovascular disease

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Bilateral structural brain injury is the necessary substrate; without it the diagnosis is untenable.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chronic mild dysarthria with intermittent dysphagia (baseline pseudobulbar palsy)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Co-existing pseudobulbar palsy features localise the lesion and support the diagnosis; being baseline argues against a new event.

symptoms.symptom_name: No NEW focal neurological deficit (no new weakness, facial droop or new slurring)

investigation_details.investigation_name: In-person neurological examination for new focal deficit
investigation_details.expected_result: No new focal motor/sensory deficit; cranial nerves otherwise intact; dysarthria at chronic baseline
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: A new acute stroke could be missed or, conversely, chronic baseline signs over-called as acute.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of a new focal deficit argues against a fresh infarct — but requires an examination the AI cannot perform.
An exaggerated gag/jaw reflex is a sign of the upper-motor-neuron bulbar involvement underlying pseudobulbar affect — a clinician-only examination finding.

symptoms.symptom_name: Alert, fully oriented, intact attention and insight

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Preserved attention and orientation exclude delirium as the driver of the acute change.

investigation_details.expected_result: Low score — not indicative of a primary depressive disorder
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Without formal in-person mood assessment, depression cannot be objectively distinguished.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A low mood-scale score supports pseudobulbar affect over depression — but the scale requires valid in-person administration.

symptoms.symptom_name: Vital signs within normal limits, afebrile

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Normal afebrile vitals argue against an acute septic/metabolic driver — but are clinician-measured and not available over chat without a home device.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Mood-incongruent involuntary crying + preserved baseline + trivial triggers + denial of sadness + known bilateral structural brain disease together are near-diagnostic and separate it from major depression.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person GP review with neurological examination
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms the benign entity and examines for any new focal deficit the telehealth encounter cannot assess.
Objectively distinguishes pseudobulbar affect from major depression.

Not indicated on this presentation (no new focal deficit); reserved for any NEW acute neurological sign, in which case it becomes immediate via the 000/ED pathway — the AI should not routinely order it here, only surface the escalation trigger.
